name: orkige-fuzz
description: Core-only dependency closure for the libFuzzer harnesses (tests/fuzz). The fuzz targets link Orkige::Core only (no engine, no OGRE), so this manifest lists just what orkige_core and the MiniZip harness compile against - it deliberately omits the render/window/audio/physics closure the root vcpkg.json pulls, so the Fuzz workflow never builds OGRE. Point vcpkg at this via -DVCPKG_MANIFEST_DIR.
